from pathlib import Path

def load():
    pts=[]
    for line in Path('/app/graphene.dat').read_text().splitlines():
        if not line.strip():
            continue
        a,b=line.split('\t')
        x=float(a.replace(',','.'))/10.0
        y=float(b.replace(',','.'))
        pts.append((x,y))
    return pts

def solve_A_C(xs, ys, x0, g):
    fs=[g*g/(((x-x0)*(x-x0))+g*g) for x in xs]
    n=len(xs)

from pathlib import Path

def load():
    pts=[]
    for line in Path('/app/graphene.dat').read_text().splitlines():
        if not line.strip(): continue
        a,b=line.split('\t')
        x=float(a.replace(',','.'))/10.0
        y=float(b.replace(',','.'))
        pts.append((x,y))
    return pts

def solve_A_C(xs, ys, x0, g):
    fs=[g*g/((x-x0)*(x-x0)+g*g) for x in xs]
    n=len(xs)
    sf=sum(fs); sf2=sum(f*f for f in fs); sy=sum(ys); sfy=sum(f*y for f,y in zip(fs,ys))
    det=sf2*n-sf*sf
    if abs(det)<1e-12: return None
    A=(sfy*n-sy*sf)/det
    C=(sf2*sy-sf*sfy)/det
    sse=sum((A*f + C - y)**2 for f,y in zip(fs,ys))
    return A,C,sse

def fit(sub,xlo,xhi,glo,ghi,stepsx=450,stepsg=350,positive=True):
    xs=[x for x,y in sub]; ys=[y for x,y in sub]
    best=None
    for i in range(stepsx+1):
        x0=xlo+(xhi-xlo)*i/stepsx
        for j in range(stepsg+1):
            g=glo+(ghi-glo)*j/stepsg
            r=solve_A_C(xs,ys,x0,g)
            if r is None: continue
            A,C,sse=r
            if positive and A < 0: continue
            if best is None or sse<best[-1]:
                best=(x0,g,A,C,sse)
    return best

for lo,hi in [(1500,1700),(1520,1660),(1540,1645),(1550,1635)]:
    sub=[p for p in pts if lo<=p[0]<=hi]
    best=fit(sub,1560,1600,1,80)
    print((lo,hi), len(sub), best)
